ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled */,
  "major" TEXT /* The student's major */,
  "minor" TEXT /* The student's minor */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic adviser */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits associated with the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* The semester in which the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the course can accommodate */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses required for enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for which the assessment is conducted */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Midterm Exam, Final Paper) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student receiving the grade */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment for which the grade is given */,
  "grade" REAL /* Received grade for the assessment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor for the assessment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was submitted by the student */,
  "graded_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was graded by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "final_grades" (
  "final_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each final grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student receiving the final grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for which the final grade is given */,
  "final_grade" REAL /* Final calculated grade for the course */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Pass or Fail status of the student in the course */,
  "letter_grade" TEXT /* Letter grade awarded based on the final grade */,
  "final_feedback" TEXT /* Final feedback provided by the instructor for the course */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA for the course */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Percentage of attendance in the course */,
  "semesters_completed" INTEGER /* Number of semesters completed by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("final_grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_final_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_final_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student providing the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_text" TEXT /* Text of the evaluation provided by the student */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation submission */,
  "instructor_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the instructor (1-5) */,
  "course_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the course (1-5) */,
  "anonymity" INTEGER /* Whether the evaluation is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the university (e.g., faculty, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
